mapper.select: SELECT C.contract_id, C.customer_id, CU.name, CU.birth_date, CU.GENDER, C.product_id as "productNo", I.productName, I.category as "productCategory", C.reg_date, C.expired_date, C.update_date, C.premium_amount, C.payment_cycle, C.contract_status FROM shez_contracts C JOIN SHEZ_INSURANCES I ON C.product_id= I.productNo JOIN shez_customers CU ON CU.customer_id = C.customer_id ORDER BY C.customer_id ASC

SELECT payment_id, payment_date, due_date, amount,
CASE status WHEN 'PAID' THEN '완납' WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '대기중' WHEN 'OVERDUE' THEN '연체' ELSE status END AS status FROM shez_payments
SELECT claim_id, claim_date, claim_amount, paid_at, paid_amount, CASE status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '대기중' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '거절' ELSE status END AS status FROM shez_claims
